# Calks.uk

> Free online calculators for the United Kingdom. Tax, salary, mortgage, pension, VAT, stamp duty, NI and 300+ more — updated for the 2025/26 tax year.

## About

Calks.uk provides over 330 free UK-focused calculators across 20 categories. All calculations are performed client-side in the user's browser. No personal data is collected or sent to servers.

## Categories

- Tax & HMRC: Income tax, NI, VAT, stamp duty, capital gains, inheritance tax, dividend tax, corporation tax, self assessment
- Salary & Employment: Take-home pay, payroll, minimum wage, holiday entitlement, redundancy, maternity/paternity pay
- Mortgage & Property: Repayment, affordability, overpayment, stamp duty, buy-to-let, shared ownership, equity release
- Pensions: Workplace pension, SIPP, drawdown, state pension, tax relief, annual allowance
- Savings & Investment: ISA, compound interest, premium bonds, stocks & shares ISA, investment returns
- Loans & Debt: Personal loan, credit card repayment, student loan, debt consolidation, APR
- Business: Corporation tax, VAT return, R&D tax credits, employer costs, CIS, IR35
- Benefits: Universal Credit, child benefit, housing benefit, pension credit, tax credits
- Motoring: Car tax, fuel cost, EV charging, car finance, mileage allowance
- Health & Wellbeing: BMI, calories, macros, heart rate zones, sleep calculator
- Construction: Bricks, concrete, tiles, timber, flooring, roofing, insulation
- Energy: Energy bills, solar panels, EV savings, heat pump, EPC rating
- Education: Student loan repayment, UCAS points, GPA, university costs
- Insurance: Life, home, car, pet, travel, income protection
- Immigration: Visa fees, ILR, citizenship, spouse visa, points calculator
- Legal: Court fees, probate, divorce settlement, personal injury
- Farming: Crop yield, fertiliser, farm costs, ELM payments
- Maths: Percentage, fractions, standard deviation, probability
- Gardening: Lawn seed, mulch, topsoil, raised beds, fencing
- Everyday Tools: Currency converter, tip calculator, date calculator, unit converters

## Data Sources

All rates and thresholds come from official UK government sources:
- HMRC (tax rates, NI thresholds, allowances)
- GOV.UK (stamp duty, pension rules, benefits rates, minimum wage)
- Bank of England (base rate)
- Office for National Statistics (inflation indices)
- The Pensions Regulator (auto-enrolment rates)
- Student Loans Company (repayment thresholds)

## Tax Year

All tax-related calculators are updated for the 2025/26 UK tax year (6 April 2025 to 5 April 2026).

## Contact

Email: info@calks.uk
Website: https://calks.uk
